disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are explicitly disabled. If the current touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen cannot be opened (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint identifiers that are disabled. If the current sub-touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen cannot be opened (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN state). Used for more granular control within a parent touchpoint.

touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint configurations defining which offers to show at each touchpoint. Each entry maps a touchpoint (by name or names) to its offer parameters and launch conditions. If no exact match is found, falls back to the touchpoint named 'default'.

names.description: Alternative names/aliases for this touchpoint. A touchpoint matches if either the 'name' field equals the requested touchpoint or the requested touchpoint is contained in this 'names' list.

name.description: Primary identifier of the touchpoint. Used to match against the requested touchpoint. A special value 'default' serves as a fallback when no other touchpoint matches.

info.description: List of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines screens to show, session tracking, launch conditions, and offer behavior. Multiple entries are evaluated in order; the first one passing all launch logic conditions is used.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier or configuration for the thank-you/success popup displayed after the user interacts with the offer.

launch_logic.description: List of launch logic rule sets that determine when this offer should be shown. Each entry defines a set of conditions (session counts, install days, subscription status, ad availability, etc.). The system evaluates each rule set in order and uses the first one where all conditions pass.

should_replace_with_ad.description: If true, the offer screen is replaced with an interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad is available for the touchpoint. Defaults to false.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: If true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded ad for AI credits. The offer is only shown if a credit-specific rewarded ad is available. Defaults to false.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) required to show the offer. Value of -1 or null means no minimum constraint.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of editor-done completions (inclusive) required to show the offer. Value of -1 or null means no minimum constraint.

app_session_end.description: Maximum app session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. Value of -1 or null means no maximum constraint. When both start and end are -1, the check is skipped.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum number of editor-done completions (exclusive) for showing the offer. Value of -1 or null means no maximum constraint.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum touchpoint-specific session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. Value of -1 or null means no minimum constraint. Tracked per touchpoint+screens composite key.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package IDs. The offer is shown only if the user previously had a subscription for at least one of these packages. Empty list or null means no constraint.

user_had_subscription.description: Whether the user must have had a previous subscription. If true, the offer is shown only to users who previously subscribed. If false, only to users who never subscribed. If null, this check is skipped.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: If true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded interstitial ad is available for the touchpoint. Defaults to false.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key session count (inclusive) for this offer's session_key. Value of -1 or null means no minimum constraint. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app installation (exclusive) for showing the offer. Value of -1 or null means no maximum constraint.

is_ai_credit.description: Whether this offer is for the AI credit flow. If true, the offer is only shown during a credit flow. If false, only shown outside a credit flow. If null, no credit flow check is applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen within this launch logic rule. Takes priority over the legacy 'offer_screen_touch_point' field.

repeat_key_session.description: Show the offer every N key sessions for this session_key (using modulo logic). Value of -1 or null means no repeat constraint. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show the offer. Value of -1 or null means no minimum constraint. Checked against cached storage usage.

is_store_available.description: Whether Google Play Store must be available as an active payment method. If true, the offer is shown only when Google Play is available. If false, shown only when Google Play is not available. Defaults to true.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key session count (exclusive) for this offer's session_key. Value of -1 or null means no maximum constraint. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty.

repeat_session.description: Show the offer every N app sessions (using modulo: appSessionCount % repeatSession == 0). Value of -1 or null means no repeat constraint.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen within this launch logic rule. Deprecated in favor of 'offer_screen_touchpoint'. Used as fallback if 'offer_screen_touchpoint' is not provided.

restricted_packages.description: List of package and offer ID pairs that restrict this offer. When non-empty, the user must be eligible for all specified promotional offers (checked via isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer). If empty or null, no restriction is applied.

package_id.description: Subscription package ID to check eligibility for. Used to verify whether the user is eligible for the promotional offer associated with this package.

offer_id.description: Promotional offer ID to validate against. Used together with package_id to check user eligibility via the subscription info service.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier types eligible for this offer. If empty or null, no tier check is applied. For subscribed users, their current tier type must be in this list. For non-subscribed users, the value 'free' must be in this list.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. Value of -1 or null means no minimum constraint. Checked against the total number of app sessions.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per day. Value of -1 or null means no daily limit. Tracked per touchpoint+screens composite key.

should_replace_with_reward.description: If true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for the touchpoint. Defaults to false.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: If true, the offer is skipped when the cooldown period (one-day pass cooldown) has not yet passed. If false or null, the cooldown check is not applied.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum touchpoint-specific session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. Value of -1 or null means no maximum constraint. Tracked per touchpoint+screens composite key.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum device storage usage percentage (exclusive) for showing the offer. Value of -1 or null means no maximum constraint.

offer_variant.description: Variant identifier for this offer configuration, used for A/B testing or selecting different offer screen presentations.

screens.description: List of offer screen names to display for this touchpoint configuration. These names identify which offer screen variants to show. Also used to build a composite key for session/daily counting (touchPoint + screens joined by dots).

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen for analytics and behavior configuration. Takes priority over the legacy 'offer_screen_touch_point' field.

session_key.description: Unique key used to track per-offer session counts (key sessions). When non-empty, the system tracks how many times this specific offer has been shown using this key, enabling key_session_start/key_session_end and repeat_key_session logic.

is_one_time_offer.description: If true, this offer can only be shown to the user once (one-time purchase offer). Defaults to false.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen. Deprecated in favor of 'offer_screen_touchpoint'. Used as fallback if 'offer_screen_touchpoint' is not provided.
